description: Balanced exploratory HF corpus materialization plan for D5. Uses the existing revision-pinned D3 manifest, but caps accepted train tokens per dataset/config so the 200M target cannot be satisfied by a single JavaScript config.
command: UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run python scripts/materialize_hf_corpus.py --manifest results/D3_hf_corpus_manifest.json --output-jsonl data/hf_mirror/exploratory_d5_balanced/corpus.jsonl --target-train-tokens 200000000 --max-train-tokens-per-config 35000000 --max-row-bytes 256000 --min-row-bytes 20 --output results/D5_hf_balanced_200m_materialization.json --experiment-id D5_hf_balanced_200m_materialization --seed 123 --no-resume

selection_policy.license_metadata: record licenses and restrictions; do not exclude normally accessible rows solely for mixed or unclear license metadata during exploration
selection_policy.splits: repository-aware stable hash split already implemented by materializer
selection_policy.deduplication: exact normalized-text SHA256 currently implemented; near-duplicate filtering remains pending
selection_policy.secrets_and_contamination: existing materializer secret, vendor/generated, prompt-injection, and known eval path filters

limitations: uses existing D3 source manifest, so language breadth is bounded by currently pinned configs
temporal split metadata is not implemented yet
tokenizer comparison is not included in this materialization command
